name: The Kaplan's Better Than Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour all of the above ingredients into your blender.
2. Blend on low speed, gradually increasing to a smooth consistency.
3. Scrape the mixture back into a cheese container and refrigerate.
You'll never taste the cottage cheese. Experiment with different flavors until you find one you love. With only 7 calories per tablespoon and virtually no artery-clogging fat or cholesterol, this recipe is a healthier alternative to traditional butter or margarine for your bread.
